title: BandanaKnight's Battle Flask's
description: A Mod Inspired By Terraria's Flask System!
body:
![Inspired By Terraria's flask system!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8368f665d07d919f4667f72f5caf43475eb2e36d.png)
# Whats A Battle Flask's?
Battle Flask's Are potions that can be drink or imbued to a weapon  causing them to inflict an additional debuffs 
![Imbue Yourself with elemental Attacks!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ce666430c390335673ed4f0d8b174ca8e7f757b.png)
# What's a Vial? 
potions which allows you to summon mystical objects to aid you.
![Summon objects to aid you in Battle!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/958ff94dfa50129e05a83457dcdbd4f382c2e789.png)

There are also 
# What are Flask grenades? 
one of the few flask's that can be thrown! (might be dangerous)
![Throw flask's that have chaotic inflicts!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3a5bc24ca29607be181da114038bdbc1ada58669.png)

and for some flask's they can also be.. 
# Enchantment Enhanced!
using enchantments from a tool some flask's can be enhanced!
![Enhance these Flask's with enchantments!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cdbd05ce4bb4cdd453ebb1f4598dd66669c2e68d.png)

# Go cause some chaos!
![Bully Bosses](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e6d7561c1def6451e1c227cba3adb890766a6af_0.webp)
inspired by terraria's flasks system.

Heres My [Youtube Channel For Updates!](https://www.youtube.com/@BandanaKnight)
(im to lazy to update my banner)

# Mod Trailer:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/APiIPZ-Rg4c" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# Book Of Battle Flask!
Wanna know the recipes? (You can't say no)
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/d1ZgbCpjIs8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>


# FlaskStation
This is where it all starts to craft the battle flask's
, in order to use this station you need to insert the recipe's items
in the correct order 
the press the mix button a few times and done!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/eGd1PFjPOuA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# ItemImbuestation
This is where you can combine items with a flask (Not The Flask Grenades)
to use it infinitely!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/e8YIh9XGkTw" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
ps you can also use a drinkable flask to stack effects!
and shields work also!

# ItemImbueExtractor
This is where you can extract flasks from an imbue item
there's no penalty to doing this so try to experiment!
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/yZSat_ei_d4" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

on a final note is prob gonna be a while 
when this mod is going to be updated 
so pls be patient im busy with my personal life.
